beliefs.belief: Physical activity significantly boosts my mood and energy levels.
beliefs.evidence: I feel more energetic during the day.

beliefs.belief: I am capable of establishing and maintaining varied, healthy routines even when life is hectic.
beliefs.evidence: I'm managing to fit in my workouts! ... I'm sticking to my workouts!

beliefs.belief: Sharing fitness experiences with others enhances the motivation and enjoyment of the activity.
beliefs.evidence: It's nice sharing the experience with others.

beliefs.belief: Engaging in diverse forms of exercise provides different but equally valuable benefits (e.g., relaxation vs. cardio).
beliefs.evidence: It's a different kind of workout and really helps me relax. I love running outdoors!

downstream_scores.dominant_theme: Commitment to and Enjoyment of Varied Fitness Routines
downstream_scores.suggested_follow_up: Since you've successfully added swimming to your routine, what part of the sport do you find most challenging or most rewarding right now?
